name: ORION SHOOTER - オリオンシューター
short_description: Orion Shooter is an easy-to-play side-scrolling shooter game created with the desire to "liven up our hometown, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture!" We hope you enjoy the local feel that permeates the game.
detailed_description:
"I want to bring more excitement to my hometown, Utsunomiya City in Tochigi Prefecture...!"

Born from that passion, Orion Shooter is a side-scrolling shooting game that you can casually enjoy.

Packed with unique local flavor, the game features dream collaborations with beloved characters, organizations, and shops active in Tochigi Prefecture. Enjoy the one-of-a-kind identity and local charm that only this title can offer!

[Operation instructions]

《Keyboard and mouse operations》

  • W, A, S, D keys / Cursor keys
    Equivalent to the cross pad (All: Move cursor up/down/left/right During gameplay: Move ship up/down/left/right)

  • Space key
    Equivalent to the A button (All: Confirm During gameplay: Shot)

  • X key
    Equivalent to the B button (All: Back During gameplay: Skill)

  • Shift key
    During gameplay: Move slowly while pressed

  • ESC key
    Title: Display game credits During gameplay: Pause, cancel pause

  • Left mouse click
    Confirm

  • Right mouse click
    Back

《Gamepad operations》

  • Cross pad / Left stick
    Cross pad (Move ship up/down/left/right, move cursor up/down/left/right)

  • A button
    A button (All: Confirm During gameplay: Shot)

  • B button
    B button (All: Back During gameplay: Skill)

  • L1 button
    During gameplay: Move slowly while pressed

  • Menu button
    During gameplay: Pause, cancel pause

[Game Introduction & Story]

A side-scrolling shooting game that's easy to understand and enjoy for players of all levels.

In the final stage, you'll face off against real-life local heroes and characters who have been brainwashed by the Demon King's magic—individuals who usually work hard to promote and support the community.

[Character Introduction]

Matsuri Aono (CV: Ruka Yashiro)

A perfectly ordinary otaku girl living somewhere in Utsunomiya City.

She often confuses those around her with her fast-talking and geeky comments...

With an energetic personality, she loves festivals and regularly wears her favorite pink happi coat as everyday attire.

Age: 20
Birthday: July 12
Blood Type: O
Hobbies: Watching anime / Playing games / Stargazing (just from her balcony)

Uni Orion (CV: Yuuri Ichinose)

A wand spirit who had long been alone in a magnificent garden atop the tallest tower in the otherworldly “Festa” that Matsuri wandered into.

Despite her youthful appearance, she claims to have lived for thousands of years. She ends her sentences with the old-fashioned “~ja,” leading Matsuri to nickname her “Noja-Loli.”

She's fascinated by modern gadgets like smartphones, which she’s never seen before.

[Credit]
